creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Muhammad Moinur Rahman from comment #3)
> Hi John,
> Seems like I missed your previous mail. I was going through the patch. So
> far it seems it's not patch-ready .. I repeat not patch-ready. There are
> STAGING problems and pkg-plist issues with this patch.


Don has a good track record, I didn't expect that. :)

Moving back to open.  And I'm removing "stage" from title, it messes up searches for unstaged ports.
